CustomField.formula: /* First image is to manage the auto misalignment applied by Salesforce*/ IMAGE("/resource/1713881378000/Gray?", "Grey", 18, 0) & IMAGE("/resource/1713881378000/Gray?", "Grey", 18, 2) & IMAGE("/resource/1713881351000/Green?", "Green", 18, Partner_Penetration__c * 100) & IMAGE("/resource/1713881378000/Gray?", "Grey", 18, ((1 - Partner_Penetration__c) * 100) + 2)
CustomField.label: Partner Penetration Score
